data.title: Competitor launches private AI platform for regulated industries
data.body: A competitor is positioning a fully private AI platform for regulated industries, emphasizing on-premise deployment, data isolation, and predictable pricing.

data.title: Launch private AI offering
data.body: Evaluate a new private AI offering in response to competitor movement in regulated markets.

data.title: Competitor signal recorded
data.body: A market note records a new competitor offering focused on private deployment for regulated teams.
